reasoning: The control CM-7 (1) focuses on ensuring least functionality and periodic review of configurations. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring that network policies are set to deny ingress by default and are periodically reviewed to ensure they are still appropriate. Similarly, RBAC roles and bindings should enforce least privilege and be periodically reviewed to ensure they are not overly permissive. These checks ensure that unnecessary access is not granted, aligning with the control's intent.
title: Least Functionality | Periodic Review
